prompt_drafts.final_prompt:
[ARTWORK REFERENCE]
Use the resolved root view file 'base_artwork_gemini_job_1782584432_8444_v1.png' as the authoritative physical reference for the artwork. The artwork's original composition, proportions, colors, marks, textures, and overall visual identity must be preserved exactly, with no modifications.

[PHYSICAL ARTWORK SPECIFICATION]
The physical object is a 'stretched_canvas' with dimensions of 80cm width × 120cm height × 2cm depth (vertical orientation). Visible edges: Yes. Edge finish: not specified. Paint continues on edges: not detected.

[SCENE CONTEXT]
The scene is a gallery/residential space with a refined and contemplative atmosphere. Context description: An abstract interplay of sky, earth, and light.. This piece captures a stylized landscape, evoking the vastness of a sun-drenched horizon through bold geometric forms and a rich, earthy palette.

[ARTWORK PLACEMENT]
The artwork must be hung flat and centered on a vertical wall. All edges of the canvas must be visible to show its 2cm depth, casting realistic, soft shadows onto the wall.

[CAMERA DIRECTION]
The camera view is biased towards a frontal angle. The composition must be a close-up or near close-up, focusing on the artwork as the primary visual subject. Avoid wide shots, fisheye lenses, and distorted room architecture.

[SCALE DIRECTION]
Maintain realistic physical scale. The artwork's physical dimensions of 80cm width by 120cm height must look accurate and proportionate relative to its immediate surroundings.

[LIGHTING DIRECTION]
The lighting in the room is soft natural light. The light must cast subtle, soft shadows from the canvas onto the wall to emphasize the canvas depth of 2cm.

[MATERIAL DIRECTION]
The materials in the space feature refined materials, providing a clean and tactile texture to the surrounding environment.

[COMMERCIAL DIRECTION]
The environment is styled for a premium exhibition presentation, avoiding a generic stock-room appearance.

[NEGATIVE PROMPT]
Avoid distorted perspective, cropped edges, altered colors, simplified artwork, wide shots (unless explicitly requested), fisheye perspective, distorted room architecture, generic stock-room appearance, excessive depth-of-field blur, or any redesign/repainting of the artwork.
